text:
Yusuf Dikec of Turkey became an internet sensation after securing a silver medal in the mixed team 10-meter air pistol event at the 2024 Paris Olympics. His relaxed demeanor, casual attire, and unconventional shooting technique of keeping both eyes open distinguished him from other athletes, capturing widespread social media attention.

Who is Yusuf Dikec? No eye gear and hand in pocket, this 51-year-old shooter wins silver at Paris Olympics

Anand Mahindra applauds 'Turkish hitman' Yusuf Dikec for his 'swag' at Paris Olympics
